Properties.commandText:
SELECT [d].[Id], [d].[DepartmentCode], [d].[Name], [d].[Description], [d].[ParentDepartmentId], [d].[IsActive]
FROM [Departments] AS [d]
WHERE [d].[IsActive] = CAST(1 AS bit)
ORDER BY [d].[Name]

SELECT TOP(1) [h].[Id], [h].[AnnualLeaveDays], [h].[AttendanceSource], [h].[AutoProcessEnabled], [h].[AutoProcessTime], [h].[BiometricConnectionString], [h].[BiometricProvider], [h].[BiometricSourceObject], [h].[CasualLeaveDays], [h].[CreatedBy], [h].[CreatedDate], [h].[GracePeriodMinutes], [h].[IsActive], [h].[OfficeEndTime], [h].[OfficeStartTime], [h].[SickLeaveDays], [h].[UpdatedBy], [h].[UpdatedDate], [h].[WeeklyOffDays]
FROM [HRSettings] AS [h]
WHERE [h].[IsActive] = CAST(1 AS bit)
ORDER BY [h].[CreatedDate] DESC

SELECT [d].[Id], [d].[DepartmentCode], [d].[Name], [d].[Description], [d].[ParentDepartmentId], [d].[IsActive]
FROM [Departments] AS [d]
WHERE [d].[IsActive] = CAST(1 AS bit)
ORDER BY [d].[Name]

Properties.commandText:
SELECT TOP(1) [h].[Id], [h].[AnnualLeaveDays], [h].[AttendanceSource], [h].[AutoProcessEnabled], [h].[AutoProcessTime], [h].[BiometricConnectionString], [h].[BiometricProvider], [h].[BiometricSourceObject], [h].[CasualLeaveDays], [h].[CreatedBy], [h].[CreatedDate], [h].[GracePeriodMinutes], [h].[IsActive], [h].[OfficeEndTime], [h].[OfficeStartTime], [h].[SickLeaveDays], [h].[UpdatedBy], [h].[UpdatedDate], [h].[WeeklyOffDays]
FROM [HRSettings] AS [h]
WHERE [h].[IsActive] = CAST(1 AS bit)
ORDER BY [h].[CreatedDate] DESC

SELECT CASE
    WHEN EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM [Designations] AS [d]
        WHERE [d].[Name] = @request_Name) THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END

Properties.commandText:
SELECT TOP(1) [d].[Id], [d].[Code], [d].[CreatedBy], [d].[CreatedDate], [d].[Description], [d].[Grade], [d].[IsActive], [d].[Name], [d].[UpdatedBy], [d].[UpdatedDate]
FROM [Designations] AS [d]
WHERE [d].[Id] = @g

SELECT CASE
    WHEN EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM [Employees] AS [e]
        WHERE [e].[DesignationId] = @g) THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END

SELECT TOP(1) [d].[Id], [d].[Code], [d].[CreatedBy], [d].[CreatedDate], [d].[Description], [d].[Grade], [d].[IsActive], [d].[Name], [d].[UpdatedBy], [d].[UpdatedDate]
FROM [Designations] AS [d]
WHERE [d].[Id] = @id

SELECT TOP(1) [d].[Id], [d].[Code], [d].[CreatedBy], [d].[CreatedDate], [d].[Description], [d].[Grade], [d].[IsActive], [d].[Name], [d].[UpdatedBy], [d].[UpdatedDate]
FROM [Designations] AS [d]
WHERE [d].[Id] = @g

SELECT CASE
    WHEN EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM [Employees] AS [e]
        WHERE [e].[DesignationId] = @g) THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END

SELECT TOP(1) [h].[Id], [h].[AnnualLeaveDays], [h].[AttendanceSource], [h].[AutoProcessEnabled], [h].[AutoProcessTime], [h].[BiometricConnectionString], [h].[BiometricProvider], [h].[BiometricSourceObject], [h].[CasualLeaveDays], [h].[CreatedBy], [h].[CreatedDate], [h].[GracePeriodMinutes], [h].[IsActive], [h].[OfficeEndTime], [h].[OfficeStartTime], [h].[SickLeaveDays], [h].[UpdatedBy], [h].[UpdatedDate], [h].[WeeklyOffDays]
FROM [HRSettings] AS [h]
WHERE [h].[IsActive] = CAST(1 AS bit)
ORDER BY [h].[CreatedDate] DESC
